# Master Source Index

Use this table as the agent's source router. When planning a campaign, the agent should cite from source notes rather than guessing from memory.

| ID | Section | Source | Type | Quality | Bias / limitation |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| SRC001 | Advertising Effectiveness | [How Advertising Works: What Do We Really Know?](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/abs/10.1177/002224299906300103) | Peer-reviewed review | High | Academic synthesis; older but foundational. |
| SRC002 | Advertising Effectiveness | [How Well Does Advertising Work? Generalizations from Meta-Analysis of Brand Advertising Elasticities](https://gwern.net/doc/economics/advertising/2011-sethuraman.pdf) | Meta-analysis | High | Academic meta-analysis; brand-level elasticities, not SaaS-specific. |
| SRC003 | Advertising Effectiveness | [Meta-analysis of Advertising Effectiveness: New Insights from Improved Bias Corrections](https://personal.eur.nl/stremersch/artikels/Korkames_Stanley_and_Stremersch_IJRM_2025_print.pdf) | Meta-analysis | High | Academic; more conservative because it corrects for bias. |
| SRC004 | Advertising Effectiveness | [The Long and the Short of It](https://ipa.co.uk/knowledge/publications-reports/the-long-and-the-short-of-it-balancing-short-and-long-term-marketing-strategies) | Effectiveness case database / practitioner research | Medium-High | IPA case database; award/case selection bias but extremely useful. |
| SRC005 | Advertising Effectiveness | [Advertising Creativity Meta-Analysis](https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.1177/0022242920929288) | Meta-analysis | High | Academic; abstract/paywall limits access. |
| SRC006 | Advertising Effectiveness | [The Effectiveness Code](https://www.warc.com/en/article/the-effectiveness-code-63d75d4dfc3547f4b8a84f6f4d1bf6e2) | Large effectiveness-awards analysis | Medium | Award-entry bias; still a valuable creative-effectiveness map. |
| SRC007 | Digital Discovery | [Digital 2025: How People Discover New Brands](https://datareportal.com/reports/digital-2025-sub-section-brand-discovery) | Industry dataset/report | Medium-High | Industry report; survey methodology and commercial framing. |
| SRC008 | Digital Discovery | [Media Reactions 2025](https://www.kantar.com/inspiration/advertising-media/media-reactions-2025-where-do-people-prefer-advertising) | Industry media receptivity report | Medium | Commercial media-research product; useful for directional channel receptivity. |
| SRC009 | Measurement | [Measuring the Effects of Advertising: The Digital Frontier](https://www.nber.org/system/files/working_papers/w19520/w19520.pdf) | Academic chapter / working paper | High | Researchers connected to platforms; still rigorous and cautionary. |
| SRC010 | Measurement | [Consumer Heterogeneity and Paid Search Effectiveness](https://www.nber.org/papers/w20171) | Large field experiment | High | eBay context; transfer carefully. |
| SRC011 | Measurement | [A Comparison of Approaches to Advertising Measurement](https://www.kellogg.northwestern.edu/faculty/gordon_b/files/fb_comparison.pdf) | Field experiments at Facebook / Marketing Science | High | Uses Facebook experiments; platform context matters. |
| SRC012 | Measurement | [The Online Display Ad Effectiveness Funnel & Carryover](https://marketing.wharton.upenn.edu/wp-content/uploads/2017/08/Johnson-Garrett-PAPER-VERSION-2.pdf) | Meta-study of 432 field experiments | High | Google Display context; display-specific. |
| SRC013 | Measurement | [Bandit-Based Experimentation System for Online Advertising](https://cdn.aaai.org/ojs/17775/17775-13-21269-1-2-20210518.pdf) | AAAI applied system paper | Medium-High | Applied platform context; useful for architecture more than universal law. |
| SRC014 | Measurement | [Online Advertising Incrementality Testing Tutorial](https://joel-barajas.github.io/kdd2021-incrementality-testing/tutorial_detailed.pdf) | Tutorial / research synthesis | Medium-High | Tutorial; not a single empirical study. |
| SRC015 | Buyer Psychology | [The Persuasion Knowledge Model](https://academic.oup.com/jcr/article/21/1/1/1853712) | Peer-reviewed theory | High | Foundational theory; older. |
| SRC016 | Buyer Psychology | [Ad Skepticism: The Consequences of Disbelief](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/abs/10.1080/00913367.2005.10639199) | Peer-reviewed empirical studies | High | Advertising skepticism research; not SaaS-specific. |
| SRC017 | Buyer Psychology | [Banner Blindness Revisited](https://www.nngroup.com/articles/banner-blindness-old-and-new-findings/) | UX research / eye-tracking synthesis | Medium-High | UX consultancy; strong observational value. |
| SRC018 | Buyer Psychology | [Fogg Behavior Model](https://behaviordesign.stanford.edu/resources/fogg-behavior-model) | Behavior design theory | High | Persuasive-design lens; simplify with care. |
| SRC019 | Software Adoption | [Perceived Usefulness, Perceived Ease of Use, and User Acceptance of Information Technology](https://www.jstor.org/stable/249008) | Peer-reviewed model | High | Classic model; simplified but durable. |
| SRC020 | Software Adoption | [Know Your Customers’ Jobs to Be Done](https://hbr.org/2016/09/know-your-customers-jobs-to-be-done) | HBR practitioner theory | Medium-High | Practitioner framing; excellent for interviews. |
| SRC021 | Software Adoption | [Diffusion of Innovations Theory Review](https://files.eric.ed.gov/fulltext/ED501453.pdf) | Academic review of classic theory | High | Educational review; theory-level. |
| SRC022 | B2B SaaS Buying | [2025 G2 Buyer Behavior Report](https://images.g2crowd.com/uploads/attachment/file/1470753/2025-G2-Buyer-Behavior-Report.pdf) | Vendor buyer survey | Medium | Review-platform incentive; useful but not neutral. |
| SRC023 | B2B SaaS Buying | [TrustRadius 2025 B2B Tech Buying in the Age of AI](https://go.trustradius.com/rs/827-FOI-687/images/TrustRadius-2025-Buyer-Research-Report-Top-10-Takeaways.pdf) | Vendor buyer survey | Medium | Review-platform incentive; triangulate. |
| SRC024 | B2B SaaS Buying | [Gartner Sales Survey: Rep-Free B2B Buying](https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2025-06-25-gartner-sales-survey-finds-61-percent-of-b2b-buyers-prefer-a-rep-free-buying-experience) | Analyst survey press release | Medium-High | Analyst firm; top-line only. |
| SRC025 | B2B SaaS Buying | [Gartner 2026 B2B Buyers Prefer Rep-Free Experience](https://www.gartner.com/en/newsroom/press-releases/2026-03-09-gartner-sales-survey-finds-67-percent-of-b2b-buyers-prefer-a-rep-free-experience) | Analyst survey press release | Medium-High | Analyst firm; top-line only. |
| SRC026 | B2B SaaS Buying | [How B2B SaaS Marketing Leaders Buy Software in 2024](https://info.wynter.com/hubfs/B2B%20buying%20journey%20study%20by%20Wynter.pdf) | Vendor buyer survey | Medium | Messaging-testing vendor; sample limited to marketing leaders. |
| SRC027 | AI Marketing | [How Generative AI Is Shaping the Future of Marketing](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11747-024-01064-3) | Peer-reviewed open-access article | High | Academic; future-looking. |
| SRC028 | AI Marketing | [Generative AI in Innovation and Marketing Processes](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11747-024-01044-7) | Peer-reviewed roadmap | High | Academic roadmap; research agenda. |
| SRC029 | AI Marketing | [Generative AI in Marketing: Applications, Opportunities, Challenges and Research Agenda](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S026840122300097X) | Academic article | Medium-High | Academic; paywall limits details. |
| SRC030 | AI Marketing | [Advertising in the Age of Agentic AI](https://www.tandfonline.com/doi/full/10.1080/15252019.2025.2557107) | Academic call for research | Medium | Research agenda rather than tested system. |
| SRC031 | AI Marketing | [Agentic AI in Advertising Guide](https://advertising.amazon.com/library/guides/agentic-ai) | Platform/practitioner guide | Medium | Platform commercial framing. |

| SRC069 | Ad Trust | [Beyond Martech: Building Trust with Consumers](https://www.nielsen.com/insights/2021/beyond-martech-building-trust-with-consumers-and-engaging-where-sentiment-is-high/) | Industry trust survey report | Medium-High | Industry survey; useful directional trust data. |
| SRC070 | Product Experiences | [2025 B2B Buyer Behavior Report](https://goconsensus.com/research/2025-b2b-buyer-behavior-report) | Vendor product-experience dataset | Medium | Vendor selling demo/product-experience software. |

## Source quality rule

Use evidence in this order:

1. Peer-reviewed meta-analysis, field experiment, or regulator/official documentation.
2. Official platform documentation for platform mechanics.
3. Large reputable industry report for current behavior and trends.
4. Vendor survey only when marked as commercially biased.
5. Blog, anecdote, or forum only as a field signal, not as a law.

## How agents should use this

- Do not paste a source link into copy unless it supports the claim.
- Do not invent statistics.
- Do not convert vendor-survey findings into universal laws.
- Use old foundational theory for mental models; use recent platform docs for current mechanics.
- Keep every campaign claim linked to product facts, not just research facts.
